title: Separation of witnesses
doc_html:
§1572.  Separation of witnesses

In investigations held by or under the direction of the fire marshal or his authorized representative, witnesses may be kept separate and apart from each other and not allowed to communicate with each other until they have been examined.
doc_text:
§1572.  Separation of witnesses
In investigations held by or under the direction of the fire marshal or his authorized representative, witnesses may be kept separate and apart from each other and not allowed to communicate with each other until they have been examined.
